Package com.csl.intercom.services

Class CpeScanService

java.lang.Object
com.csl.intercom.services.CpeScanService
public class CpeScanService extends Object
Represents and handles the list of currently running scans. Should not be created, but accessed through the static instance.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(DataSynchronizationService cpeItemsSynchronizationService, DataSynchronizationService microsoftKbSynchronizationService)

    • createOrUpdate

      public void createOrUpdate(ScanEntity scan)
      Add a scan in the list, or overwrite it if it already exists.
      Parameters:
      scan - The scan to add to the list.

    • getScanByScanId

      public ScanEntity getScanByScanId(String scanId)
      Get a scan from its CSL-Scan id, or null.
      Parameters:
      scanId - The id to seek.
      Returns:
      The scan entity if found, null otherwise.

    • getRunningScan

      public ScanEntity getRunningScan()
      Get the (first) running scan.
      Returns:
      The first (though should be the only) scan if there is one, null if no scan is running.

    • getFinishedScan

      public ScanEntity getFinishedScan()
      Get the first finished scan.
      Returns:
      The first scan that is finished if any, null otherwise.

    • cancelScan

      public void cancelScan() throws CpeScanException
      Throws:
      CpeScanException
